backend/main.mo: Motoko canister implementing access-controlled user profiles, conversations, messaging, and gallery items with ID counters and permission checks.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing UI theme, color, and icon consistency requirements with associated files and components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Plain-text mapping of frontend file paths to short descriptive summaries for reference or tooling.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS variables and base layer defining light/dark theme tokens for background, text, cards, and sidebar.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point loading the root div and main React TypeScript bundle.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app configuring routes, themes, authentication gating, and layout wrappers.
frontend/src/components/auth/AuthGate.ts: Auth wrapper that redirects unauthenticated users and shows a branded loading or redirect screen.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal prompting first‑time authenticated users to save their display name, with form handling and backend persistence.
frontend/src/components/background/Butte: Generates and animates decorative butterfly SVGs in the background using randomized positions and timings.
Renders a vertical list of labeled horizontal bars scaled relative to the maximum value.
Draws a pie chart using SVG path segments and displays a legend for each slice.
frontend/src/components/chat/ChatCompose: Text input and send button for submitting chat messages, supporting Enter-to-send.
frontend/src/components/chat/ChatMessage: Scrollable message list with auto‑scrolling and role‑based alignment and avatars.
frontend/src/components/gallery/GalleryC: Displays a gallery item with type‑based styling, metadata, and view/download actions.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppHeader: Top header showing user profile info and a dropdown with logout functionality.
Main application layout with sidebar navigation, header, mobile drawer, and background.
frontend/src/components/navigation/Sideb: Navigation menu listing main app routes with active‑state styling and icons.
frontend/src/components/video/VideoPrevi: Preview component that renders a styled vertical video mockup based on draft data.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to user identity and refreshes dependent queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useChatSession.ts: Maintains per‑user chat history with localStorage persistence and canned assistant replies.
frontend/src/hooks/useGalleryItems.ts: Wrapper hook returning gallery items filtered by type.
frontend/src/hooks/useGalleryPublish.ts: Provides helpers to publish photos, videos, or analytics items to the gallery.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and provider for Internet Identity authentication, handling login, logout, and stored identity loading.
frontend/src/hooks/useMakerDraft.ts: Manages saving, updating, and clearing localStorage-backed photo or video maker drafts.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Wraps backend actor calls with React Query to fetch and mutate user profiles and gallery items.
frontend/src/hooks/useSavedAnalytics.ts: Stores and retrieves user-specific analytics data in localStorage based on Internet Identity.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind base styles and custom color themes, gradients, animations, and global UI utilities.
frontend/src/lib/analytics/compute.ts: Computes profit metrics and prepares chart data from financial form inputs.
frontend/src/lib/chat/cannedReplies.ts: Generates canned AI-style replies based on keyword detection in user messages.
frontend/src/lib/poster/renderPosterToCa: Renders a poster design onto a canvas using gradients, text, and optional offer or contact details.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/pages/BusinessAnalyticsPage: Displays a financial input form, computes analytics, saves results, and allows gallery publishing.
frontend/src/pages/ChatPage.tsx: Provides a chat UI with message history, message sending, and session management.
frontend/src/pages/GalleryPage.tsx: Displays gallery items filtered by type using tabs, showing loading state, results, or an empty message.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Handles Internet Identity login and redirects authenticated users to the home page.
frontend/src/pages/MakerLandingPage.tsx: Landing page offering entry points to photo and video maker workflows.
frontend/src/pages/photo-for-post/PhotoD: Form page collecting business details for generating a photo poster and saving them to a draft.
frontend/src/pages/photo-for-post/PhotoR: Renders the final poster to a canvas and allows downloading or saving it to the gallery.
frontend/src/pages/photo-for-post/PhotoT: Lets users select a poster theme and saves the choice before generating the final result.
frontend/src/pages/ShopMakerPage.tsx: Placeholder page announcing an upcoming shop builder with feature previews and a notify button.
frontend/src/pages/video-for-reels/Video: Form page for entering business info for a video and saving it to a draft before choosing a style.
Displays a video preview using the current draft and allows exporting a placeholder preview or saving the video to the gallery.
Lets users choose a video animation style, updates the draft, and navigates to the preview page.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility helpers for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters with sessionStorage fallback.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining theme extensions, colors, typography, and animation plugins.
project_state.json: Metadata describing project state, theme direction, known issues, and existing feature definitions.
